title: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients
content: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Research Economic Futures Commitments Learn News Try Claude Announcements PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients May 14, 2026 Anthropic and PwC today announced an expansion of their strategic alliance, deepening how PwC uses Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients across every industry it serves. Most enterprises are still running on systems and processes built for a pre-AI world—a drag that is estimated to be more than $2 trillion. Together, Anthropic and PwC are helping companies replace that weight and rebuild around AI. "PwC has been leading AI's expansion into the parts of the economy where accuracy and reliability are non-negotiable—financial services, healthcare, life sciences, cybersecurity—and the results are clear. Insurance underwriting that took 10 weeks now takes 10 days. Security work that took hours now takes minutes. We're excited to put Claude in the hands of hundreds of thousands of people across PwC's workforce," said Dario Amodei, Co-founder and CEO, Anthropic. "The conversation around AI has shifted from possibility to execution. Clients are looking for ways to apply AI that are secure, responsible, and capable of delivering measurable outcomes in complex business environments. Our collaboration with Anthropic brings together advanced AI capabilities and PwC's industry experience to help organizations move from explorat
eventKey: pwc-deploying-claude-build-technology-execute
normalizedTitle: pwc is deploying claude to build technology execute deals and reinvent enterprise functions for clients
scoreReasoning: 官方发布重大企业级应用案例。展示AI在企业核心业务流程（软件、交易、财务）的深度整合，信号强，对判断产品形态和企业采纳趋势至关重要。
summary: PwC has expanded its partnership with Anthropic to deploy Claude AI across its global workforce and client services. The rollout includes Claude Code for software delivery, Claude Cowork for productivity tools, and a new Office of the CFO to transform finance functions. PwC will train and certify 30,000 professionals, focusing on agentic technology builds, AI‑native deal making, and enterprise function reinvention. Deployments already reduce delivery times up to 70 % in areas such as insurance underwriting, mainframe modernization, and cybersecurity.

content: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities. We’re starting with a preview to a smaller group so we can learn from real-world use, improve the experience, and expand thoughtfully. title: Anthropic 高管：公司 90% 代码已由 AI 完成
content: Anthropic 首席财务官称，AI 已编写公司 90% 的代码，使白领工作重心从执行转向监督。该公司认为，AI 未必直接消灭大量岗位，但会自动化员工日常大部分执行任务，让员工成为 AI 系统「监督者」。 Anthropic 首席财务官称，AI 已编写公司 90% 的代码，使白领工作重心从执行转向监督。该公司认为，AI 未必直接消灭大量岗位，但会自动化员工日常大部分执行任务，让员工成为 AI 系统「监督者」。 Anthropic 高管：公司 90% 代码已由 AI 完成 36Kr / 财联社 / 钛媒体 / 格隆汇 Anthropic 高管：公司 90% 代码已由 AI 完成 白领工作重心转向监督 快科技 2026-05-14 Anthropic 高管：公司 90% 代码已由 AI 完成 2026-04-09 Anthropic 完成要约收购 员工愿意出售的股份数量有限 2026-03-12 消息称 Anthropic 正与黑石集团等商谈成立 AI 咨询公司 2026-01-30 环球音乐等集团指控 AI 公司 Anthropic 侵犯版权，索赔或超 30 亿美元 2025-03-12 Anthropic CEO：AI 将在未来 3 到 6 个月内完成 90% 编程工作 2025-01-24 Anthropic CEO：AI 可能在两到三年内超越人类智能 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

summary: Anthropic’s CFO reports that AI has written roughly 90 % of the company’s code, shifting white‑collar jobs from execution to oversight. The firm believes AI will not necessarily eliminate many positions but will automate most routine tasks, turning employees into supervisors of the AI systems.

title: Anthropic 企业采用率首超 OpenAI
content: Ramp AI Index 报告显示，4 月 Anthropic 企业采用率上升 3.8% 至 34.4%，OpenAI 采用率下降 2.9% 至 32.3%。过去一年，Anthropic 企业采用率增长 4 倍，OpenAI 仅增长 0.3%。不过，报告指出 Anthropic 优势可能不稳固，上升的成本、算力限制及「基于 Token 计费」模式或构成威胁。该报告追踪超 5 万家美国企业支出模式。 Ramp AI Index 报告显示，4 月 Anthropic 企业采用率上升 3.8% 至 34.4%， OpenAI 采用率下降 2.9% 至 32.3%。过去一年，Anthropic 企业采用率增长 4 倍，OpenAI 仅增长 0.3%。不过，报告指出 Anthropic 优势可能不稳固，上升的成本、算力限制及「基于 Token 计费」模式或构成威胁。该报告追踪超 5 万家美国企业支出模式。 报告：Anthropic 企业采用率首超 OpenAI 格隆汇 / 财联社 / 钛媒体 2026-04-23 Anthropic 二级市场估值升至万亿美元，超越 OpenAI 2026-04-14 OpenAI 四页内部信曝光：Anthropic 营收注水 80 亿美元 2026-02-26 OpenAI 与 Anthropic 毛利目标双双落空，非付费用户与算力成主要负担 2026-01-28 Anthropic 预计其 2025 年营收将达 550 亿美元 2026-01-25 OpenAI 欲从 Anthropic 手中争夺企业客户 2025-08-28 ​OpenAI 与 Anthropic 进行首次合作测试，推动 AI 安全标准 2025-08-22 Anthropic 将 Claude Code 整合进企业计划 提升 AI 开发治理能力 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍
eventKey: anthropic-企业采用率首超-openai
normalizedTitle: anthropic 企业采用率首超 openai
scoreReasoning: 报道关键竞争动态（Anthropic企业采用率首超OpenAI）。信号清晰，对研判AI模型市场竞争格局和客户偏好变化有直接判断价值。
summary: Anthropic’s enterprise adoption rate rose 3.8 % to 34.4 % in April, surpassing OpenAI’s rate, which fell 2.9 % to 32.3 %. Over the past year, Anthropic’s adoption quadrupled, while OpenAI’s increased by only 0.3 %. The report cautions that Anthropic’s advantage may be fragile, citing rising costs, compute limits, and its token‑based billing model. The analysis tracked spending patterns of more than 50,000 U.S. businesses.

title: 微软寻求收购 AI 公司以摆脱对 OpenAI 依赖
content: 知情人士称，微软正寻求收购人工智能初创公司，以摆脱对 OpenAI 的依赖，储备 AI 人才，推进明年前打造先进 AI 模型的目标。今年春季，微软曾考虑收购代码生成初创公司 Cursor，但因监管审查问题放弃。目前，微软正与 Inception 谈判，其旗下风险投资基金 M12 于 2025 年末参与了该公司 5000 万美元种子轮融资。微软在竞购中面临来自马斯克旗下 SpaceX 等科技巨头的竞争，SpaceX 也曾接触 Inception。 知情人士称， 微软 正寻求收购人工智能初创公司，以摆脱对 OpenAI 的依赖，储备 AI 人才，推进明年前打造先进 AI 模型的目标。今年春季，微软曾考虑收购代码生成初创公司 Cursor ，但因监管审查问题放弃。目前，微软正与 Inception 谈判，其旗下风险投资基金 M12 于 2025 年末参与了该公司 5000 万美元种子轮融资。微软在竞购中面临来自 马斯克 旗下 SpaceX 等科技巨头的竞争，SpaceX 也曾接触 Inception。 消息称微软筹备收购 AI 初创企业，降低对 OpenAI 依赖 凤凰科技 / IT 之家 / 新浪科技 千亿美元投资 OpenAI 后，曝微软为强化自研 AI 开发正寻求收购更多初创公司 IT 之家 / 新浪科技 2026-05-14 微软寻求收购 AI 公司以摆脱对 OpenAI 依赖 2026-05-14 微软正探索与人工智能初创公司达成交易 以为「后 OpenAI 时代」做准备 2026-04-27 微软：将不再向 OpenAI 支付收入分成 2026-04-19 微软收购 Fintool，AI 金融研究工具将深度融入 Office 全家桶 2026-04-03 微软计划明年推出大型前沿 AI 模型 追求自主先进技术 2026-01-30 Perplexity 与微软签署 7.5 亿美元协议，将使用 Azure 云服务 2026-01-06 微软收购 AI 数据平台 Osmos 2025-11-06 微软宣布组建超级智能团队，自研 AI 模型摆脱对 OpenAI 的依赖 2025-10-03 微软斥资 330 亿美元押注新兴云服务企业，以缓解人工智能算力紧张局面 2025-09-26 微软整合面向企业的人工智能应用商店 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

summary: Microsoft is seeking to acquire an AI startup to reduce its dependence on OpenAI, secure talent, and meet its goal of developing advanced AI models by next year. After dropping an attempt to buy code‑generation firm Cursor due to regulatory concerns, Microsoft is negotiating with Inception, whose M12 venture fund invested $50 million in a 2025 seed round. The deal faces competition from SpaceX and other tech giants that are also interested in Inception.

title: 苹果安全防线向来难以攻破，Mythos却帮助找到了突破口
content: Apple’s security has long been considered formidable, but researchers have identified a new bypass technique. The method was discovered during tests of an early version of Anthropic’s Mythos AI software in April. This approach allows circumventing some of Apple’s most advanced security measures.
eventKey: 苹果安全防线向来难以攻破-mythos却帮助找到了突破口

summary: Apple’s security has long been considered formidable, but researchers have identified a new bypass technique. title: Control where your AI agents can browse with Chrome enterprise policies on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
content: In this post, you will configure Chrome enterprise policies to restrict a browser agent to a specific website, observe the policy enforcement through session recording, and demonstrate custom root CA certificates using a public test site. The walkthrough produces a working solution that researches Amazon Bedrock AgentCore documentation while operating under enterprise browser restrictions. Artificial Intelligence Control where your AI agents can browse with Chrome enterprise policies on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore by Sundar Raghavan , Netal Gupta , Ravi Kandury , and Saurav Das on 14 MAY 2026 in Advanced (300) , Amazon Bedrock , Amazon Bedrock AgentCore , Amazon Machine Learning , Artificial Intelligence , Technical How-to Permalink Comments Share AI agents with unrestricted web access pose significant security risks. Without Chrome enterprise policies to control browser behavior, an agent might navigate to unauthorized domains, store credentials in the browser’s password manager, or download files outside approved workflows. Organizations with internal services that use a private certificate authority (CA) face an additional barrier. Every HTTPS connection to those services fails with certificate validation errors. Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Browser now supports Chrome enterprise policies and custom root CA certificates to give organizations granular control over agent browser behavior and connectivity. With Chrome policies, you can configure over 450 browser settings, including URL filtering, download restrictions, and password manager controls, applied through familiar Chrome
eventKey: control-where-your-agents-can-browse
normalizedTitle: control where your ai agents can browse with chrome enterprise policies on amazon bedrock agentcore
scoreReasoning: 云平台新功能，涉及AI Agent安全和工程实践，对开发和部署有直接参考价值。
summary: AI agents with unrestricted web access pose significant security risks. Without Chrome enterprise policies to control browser behavior, an…

title: Raising the bar: Quality, shared responsibility, and the future of GitHub’s bug bounty program
content: We're updating our bug bounty program standards to prioritize quality submissions and clarify shared responsibility boundaries. Skip to content Skip to sidebar / Blog Changelog Docs Customer stories Try GitHub Copilot CLI See what's new AI & ML AI & ML Learn about artificial intelligence and machine learning across the GitHub ecosystem and the wider industry. Change how you work with GitHub Copilot. Everything developers need to know about LLMs. Machine learning tips, tricks, and best practices. Explore the capabilities and benefits of AI code generation and how it can improve your developer experience.
eventKey: raising-bar-quality-shared-responsibility-future
normalizedTitle: raising the bar quality shared responsibility and the future of github’s bug bounty program
scoreReasoning: 官方博客明确平台政策变化，对开发者与安全研究有指导意义。
summary: GitHub’s bug‑bounty program is tightening its standards amid rising submission volumes. Only findings with a working proof of concept, clear impact, and validated scope will be accepted; generic or theoretical reports will be rejected. AI‑assisted research is welcomed as long as it is verified. GitHub clarifies that security incidents involving user‑trusted content fall under shared responsibility, not platform bypasses. Low‑risk, non‑exploitable reports will now receive swag instead of bounties to focus rewards on high‑impact discoveries.

title: Claude Code 太好用，微软决定砍掉它
content: 5 月 14 日，The Verge 的微软专栏作者 Tom Warren 发了一条消息：微软正在内部大规模取消 Claude Code 的使用许可，数千名开发者被要求在 6 月 30 日 —— 即微软当前财年的最后一天前，改用 GitHub Copilot CLI。
